tasks.title: Rotate exposed provider keys
tasks.objective: Keep Claudex control plane current and secure
tasks.outcome: Previously exposed OpenAI, Notion, Resend, and v0 credentials no longer authorize access
tasks.next_action: Rotate each flagged key at its provider and update only the protected secret locations
tasks.definition_of_done: Old keys fail, new keys work from protected stores, and no committed file contains values
tasks.why_now: Credential exposure is a standing security warning with direct account impact

tasks.title: Move live credentials outside the Claudex tree
tasks.objective: Keep Claudex control plane current and secure
tasks.outcome: No live credential value is stored anywhere inside the repository tree
tasks.next_action: Select the protected host location, move values, preserve pointer only documentation, and run the secret scan
tasks.definition_of_done: The vault file is absent from the repo tree, provider pointers remain valid, and npm run check passes
tasks.why_now: The current bridge warns that local live credentials still sit under the repository path

tasks.title: Resolve the SwarmClaw routing conflict

tasks.title: Advance Footprint strategy within the implementation hold
